headline: At Risk in North American Trade Talks: Cheap Cars
summary: Average car prices have been rising since the pandemic and tariffs. Now the availability of low-cost new cars hangs in the balance as the United States, Mexico, Canada trade deal talks begin.

headline: Tesla Is Burning Billions to Build Its AI Future—and the Stock Is Feeling It
summary: Tesla  stock rose in April.  The move comes after Tesla stock gained 2.7% in April, its first positive month for 2026.  Investors have lofty expectations for Tesla’s plans to populate the world with “physical AI” applications such as robo-taxis and robots.

headline: The Reason GM Stock Is Beating Ford and Tesla. (It Has Nothing to Do With Cars or Tariffs.)
summary: General Motors  was the exception.  Tesla reported better pricing and more subscriptions for its Full Self-Driving driver-assistance product.  Stellantis was “steady,” if not stellar, according to Oxcap analyst Stuart Pearson.

headline: Assessing General Motors (GM) Valuation After Strong Long Term Shareholder Returns
summary: General Motors (GM) shares recently closed at US$76.89, drawing attention as investors weigh the automaker’s scale, with US$184.6b in revenue and US$2.4b in net income, against mixed short term and longer term return figures. See our latest analysis for General Motors. The recent 1 month share price return of 3.21% contrasts with a 3 month share price decline of 8.46%. At the same time, a 1 year total shareholder return of 72.41% points to stronger longer term momentum, supported by a 3 year...

headline: Jim Cramer on MP Materials: “They’ve Got the Government’s Backing”
summary: On the Lightning Round of Mad Money on April 29, 2026, a caller named Kimo from California, whose fiancée Michelle had gifted him Jim Cramer’s book the prior December, told the host he had “done quite well between December and now” on his rare earths bet. Cramer’s verdict on the name in question was unambiguous: ... Jim Cramer on MP Materials: “They’ve Got the Government’s Backing”
